title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at MBD Group Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at MBD Group Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the MBD Group Global Group family as a Instructional Designer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MBD Group Global Group:
MBD Group Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MBD Group Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
